description: Local candidates preferred or willing to relocate covering their own expenses Possible 3 Month CTH | No Fees | Do Not Re-Post | Confidential Skype interview is mandatory please provide the candidate’s skype ID Submit candidates under their legal name and use only Capgemini template ------------------------------ In your submission (at the top of the first page) include: Phone #: Email address: Location (City and State): Relocate: Availability to start: Visa type and expiration: Hiring Status: C2C/W2/1099 Open for CTH (y/n): Timeslots for Skype interview (provide Skype ID) ------------------------------ Job description: 8 years of experience in IT. 5 years of experience in IBM WebSphere Portal V8.5 installation, configuration and customization. 3 years of experience in IBM WCM V8.5 installation, configuration and customization. Experience in scripting, automation and batch processes. Experience with XML access, WCM Syndication and Portal Deployment best practices Experience with installing and configuring Portlets Experience working in onsite-offshore distributed development teams. Experience working in an agile work environment is nice to have Ability to plan Portal installation, upgrades, cumulative fix installations and produce written (run books) documentation (procedures and work instructions) Experience with DevOps tools like Maven, Jenkins, Nexus, Docker, etc. Experience Designing and Implementing IBM WebSphere Portal Security with Single Sign-on, LDAP and Microsoft Active Directory. Experience working with IBM Tech Support for raising PMRs, etc. Good communication & interpersonal skills backed by sound analytical, and technical skills. Arturo Aquino OBO Tactical Procurement | Procurement Capgemini North America | Guatemala Tel.: 1 888-229-2961 Ext 13846 arturo.aquino@capgemini.com
